/*PRODUCT BOOKINGS PLAN SUB-BE CORE*/
SELECT
	SCORECARD_ID ,
	METRIC_ID ,
	MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 ,
	HIERARCHY_TYPE ,
	AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC ,
	TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC ,
	FNL_QRY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
	RFMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID ,
    ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	NULL AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT ,
	AMOUNT_VALUE ,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
    USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
(
	SELECT
	1 SCORECARD_ID,
	1001 METRIC_ID,
	'PRODUCT BOOKINGS' AS MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
	'SUB BE' AS HIERARCHY_TYPE,
	'PLAN' AS AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC,
	'QUARTERLY' TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC,
	T.MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
	T.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3,
	T.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	'CORE' AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2,
	TRIM(T.MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT) AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT,
	T.MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT AS AMOUNT_VALUE
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
			'PRODUCT PLAN' AS FCST_TYPE,
			'CORE' AS ACQ_SOURCE_CD ,
			MADEFOR.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
			MADEFOR.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
			FCASP2.LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT AS SOURCE_TYPE,
			ALLOC.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			ALLOC.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			SUM(CASE WHEN  MPF.BUDGET_ROLE = 'Y' AND MPF.RU_BUDGET_FISCAL_YEAR_NBR_INT = MPF.FCST_FOR_FISCAL_YEAR_NBR_INT
											 THEN MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT * COALESCE (ALLOC.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)
				ELSE 0 END ) AS MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT1,
			CAST(MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT,	
			SUM(CASE WHEN  MPF.BUDGET_ROLE = 'Y' AND MPF.RU_BUDGET_FISCAL_YEAR_NBR_INT = MPF.FCST_FOR_FISCAL_YEAR_NBR_INT
							THEN MARKETING_FCST_UNIT_QTY * COALESCE (ALLOC.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)
				ELSE 0 END ) AS MARKETING_FCST_UNIT_QTY
		FROM
			$$INVFLMTVWDB.MT_PRODUCT_FCST  MPF
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP ON
				MPF.PRODUCT_KEY=RP.ITEM_KEY
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MADEFOR ON
				MPF.FCST_MADE_FOR_YEAR_MONTH_INT=MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MADEON ON
				MPF.FCST_MADE_ON_YEAR_MONTH_INT=MADEON.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
			INNER JOIN
			(
				SELECT LOV_VALUE_CHAR,
					LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT
				FROM $$COMREFSVDB.SV_LIST_OF_VALUES_CHAR
				WHERE LOV_APPLICATION_NAME = 'ALL'
					AND LOV_NAME = 'BOOKINGS_TYPE'
					AND LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT = 'Product'
			) FCASP2
				ON FCASP2.LOV_VALUE_CHAR = 'N'
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC ALLOC ON
			ALLOC.ITEM_KEY=RP.ITEM_KEY
			AND ALLOC.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
		WHERE 1=1
			AND ALLOC.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
			AND RP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'WEBEX'
			AND MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (-1,0,1,2)
			AND MADEFOR.FISCAL_QTR_AGE BETWEEN -8 AND 12
			AND (  	 MPF.BUDGET_ROLE = 'Y'
						)
		GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
	)T
)FNL_QRY
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
	FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (-2,-1,0,1,2)

GROUP BY 1,2)RFMY  ON
RFMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME = FNL_QRY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME

/* PRODUCT REVENUE ACTUAL SUBBE CORENCORE*/
SELECT
	SCORECARD_ID ,
	METRIC_ID ,
	MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
	HIERARCHY_TYPE ,
	AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC ,
	TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC ,
	FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
	FISCAL_QUARTER_ID ,
	ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 , /*BE*/
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4, /*SUB BE*/
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT,
AMOUNT_VALUE    ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
(
	SELECT
	1 SCORECARD_ID,
	1002 METRIC_ID,
	'PRODUCT REVENUE' AS MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
	'SUB BE' AS HIERARCHY_TYPE,
	'ACTUAL' AS AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC,
	'QUARTERLY' TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC,
	T.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
	FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
	T.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3,
	T.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	NULL AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	T.ACQ_SOURCE_CD AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2,
	'$' || TRIM(T.REVENUE_MARGIN) || ' B' AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT,
	TRIM(T.REVENUE_MARGIN) AS AMOUNT_VALUE
	FROM
	$$STGDB.WI_AUTD_SCD_GMRGN_REV_SUBBE T
		INNER JOIN (
SELECT	FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR
WHERE	FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (-1,0,1,2)
GROUP	BY 1,2)RFMY
	ON	RFMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME = T.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
)A

/* For the past quarters, Forecast made on 1st month of the Quarter, for the respective  quarter , For Current/Future quarters, forecast made on the current month , for current and future quarters */

SELECT
	SCORECARD_ID ,
	METRIC_ID ,
	MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 ,
	HIERARCHY_TYPE ,
	AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC ,
	TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC ,
	FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
	FISCAL_QUARTER_ID ,
    ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	NULL AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT ,
	AMOUNT_VALUE  ,
     CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
(
	SELECT
	1 SCORECARD_ID,
	1001 METRIC_ID,
	CAST('PRODUCT BOOKINGS' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
	CAST('SUB BE' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_TYPE,
	CAST('TARGET' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC,
	CAST('QUARTERLY' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC,
	T.MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
	MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
	T.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3,
	T.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	T.ACQ_SOURCE_CD AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2,
	TRIM(T.MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT) AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT,
	T.MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT AS AMOUNT_VALUE
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
			'PRODUCT COMMIT' AS FCST_TYPE,
			'CORE' AS ACQ_SOURCE_CD ,
			MADEFOR.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
			MADEFOR.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
			FCASP2.LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT AS SOURCE_TYPE,
			ALLOC.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			ALLOC.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			SUM(CASE WHEN  MPF.COMMIT_ROLE = 'Y' AND MPF.RU_COMMIT_FISCAL_YEAR_NBR_INT = MPF.FCST_FOR_FISCAL_YEAR_NBR_INT
						AND MPF.RU_COMMIT_FISCAL_QTR_NBR_INT = MPF.FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
					 THEN MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT * COALESCE (ALLOC.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)
				ELSE 0 END ) AS MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT1,
			CAST(MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT,	
			SUM(CASE WHEN  MPF.COMMIT_ROLE = 'Y' AND MPF.RU_COMMIT_FISCAL_YEAR_NBR_INT = MPF.FCST_FOR_FISCAL_YEAR_NBR_INT
						AND MPF.RU_COMMIT_FISCAL_QTR_NBR_INT = MPF.FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
						THEN MARKETING_FCST_UNIT_QTY * COALESCE (ALLOC.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)
				ELSE 0 END ) AS MARKETING_FCST_UNIT_QTY
		FROM
			$$INVFLMTVWDB.MT_PRODUCT_FCST  MPF
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP ON
				MPF.PRODUCT_KEY=RP.ITEM_KEY
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MADEFOR ON
				MPF.FCST_MADE_FOR_YEAR_MONTH_INT=MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MADEON ON
				MPF.FCST_MADE_ON_YEAR_MONTH_INT=MADEON.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
			INNER JOIN
			(
				SELECT LOV_VALUE_CHAR,
					LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT
				FROM $$COMREFSVDB.SV_LIST_OF_VALUES_CHAR
				WHERE LOV_APPLICATION_NAME = 'ALL'
					AND LOV_NAME = 'BOOKINGS_TYPE'
					AND LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT = 'Product'
			) FCASP2
				ON FCASP2.LOV_VALUE_CHAR = 'N'
		INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC ALLOC ON
			ALLOC.ITEM_KEY=RP.ITEM_KEY
			AND ALLOC.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT=MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
		WHERE 1=1
			AND ALLOC.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
			AND RP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'WEBEX'
			AND MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (-1,0,1,2)
			AND MADEFOR.FISCAL_QTR_AGE BETWEEN -12 AND 12
			AND (  	MADEFOR.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID = MADEON.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
							OR MADEON.FISCAL_QTR_AGE = 0
							OR MPF.COMMIT_ROLE = 'Y'
						)
		GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
)T
)FNL_QRY

/*PRODUCT BOOKINGS ACTUAL SUB-BE CORENCORE*/
SELECT
	SCORECARD_ID ,
	METRIC_ID ,
	MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 ,
	HIERARCHY_TYPE ,
	AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC ,
	TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC ,
	FNL_QRY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
	RFMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID ,
    ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	NULL AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT ,
	AMOUNT_VALUE,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
    USER EDW_CREATE_USER

FROM
(
	SELECT
		1 SCORECARD_ID,
		1001 METRIC_ID,
		'PRODUCT BOOKINGS' AS MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
		'SUB BE' AS HIERARCHY_TYPE,
		'ACTUAL' AS AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC,
		'QUARTERLY' TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC,
		T.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
		T.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3,
		T.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
		T.ACQ_SOURCE_CD AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2,
		'$' || T.BOOKINGS_AMOUNT || ' B' AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT,
		T.BOOKINGS_AMOUNT AS AMOUNT_VALUE
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
			X.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
			DIM_2 AS ACQ_SOURCE_CD,
			X.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			X.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			SUM(BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) AS BOOKINGS_AMOUNT1,
			TRIM(CAST(SUM(BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) AS DECIMAL(26,7))) BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
		FROM
		(
			SELECT
				FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
				LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT AS DIM_2,
				SUB.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
				SUB.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
				SUM(RBF.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * COALESCE(PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)) BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
			FROM
				$$SLSORDVWDB.R_BOOKINGS_PF_STL3_FMTH   RBF
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFSVDB.SV_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH
					ON	RBF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMT
					ON	RBF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_FAMILY_SBE_ALLOCATION  ALLOC
					ON ALLOC.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=RBF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
					AND ALLOC.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT=RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
					AND ALLOC.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUM_INT=RFMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY  SUB
					ON ALLOC.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME =SUB.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LIST_OF_VALUES_CHAR LOV
ON LOV.LOV_VALUE_CHAR=RBF.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_CD
AND LOV.LOV_NAME='Acquisition_Source_Code' 
	/*AND	RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('WW DISTRIBUTION') */
				AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  /* This was not there earlier added to match BO*/
				AND	RBF.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG = 'Y' 
				AND	RBF.SERVICE_FLG='N'
				AND ALLOC.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND SUB.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND	RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,	1)
				AND	RFMT.FISCAL_QTR_AGE >= 0
			GROUP	BY 1,2,3,4
			/*TODO if the filter on 'WW DISTRIBUTION' is required for the fiscal age 2 as well , then UNION can be removed */
			UNION ALL

			SELECT
				FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
				LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT AS DIM_2,
				SUB.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
				SUB.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
				SUM(RBF.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * COALESCE(PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)) BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
			FROM
				$$SLSORDVWDB.R_BOOKINGS_PF_STL3_FMTH   RBF
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFSVDB.SV_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH
					ON	RBF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMT
					ON	RBF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_FAMILY_SBE_ALLOCATION  ALLOC
					ON ALLOC.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=RBF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
					AND ALLOC.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT=RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
					AND ALLOC.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUM_INT=RFMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY  SUB
					ON ALLOC.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME =SUB.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LIST_OF_VALUES_CHAR LOV
ON LOV.LOV_VALUE_CHAR=RBF.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_CD
AND LOV.LOV_NAME='Acquisition_Source_Code' 
				/*AND	RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('WW DISTRIBUTION') */
			   AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' /* This was not there earlier added to match BO*/
				AND	RBF.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG = 'Y' 
				AND	RBF.SERVICE_FLG='N'
				AND ALLOC.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND SUB.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND	RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE =2
			GROUP	BY 1,2,3,4
		)X
		GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
	)T
)FNL_QRY
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
	FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (-2,-1,0,1,2)
GROUP BY 1,2)RFMY  ON
RFMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME = FNL_QRY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
WHERE 1=1;

			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LIST_OF_VALUES_CHAR LOV
ON LOV.LOV_VALUE_CHAR=RBF.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_CD
AND LOV.LOV_NAME='Acquisition_Source_Code'

/*Product  SBE forecast*/

SELECT
	SCORECARD_ID ,
	METRIC_ID ,
	MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 ,
	HIERARCHY_TYPE ,
	AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC ,
	TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC ,
	FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
	FISCAL_QUARTER_ID ,
    ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	NULL AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT ,
	AMOUNT_VALUE ,
      CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
     USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM
(

	SELECT
	1 SCORECARD_ID,
	1001 METRIC_ID,
	CAST('PRODUCT BOOKINGS' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
	CAST('SUB BE' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS HIERARCHY_TYPE,
	CAST('FORECAST' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC,
	CAST('QUARTERLY' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC,
	T.MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
	T.MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
	T.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3,
	T.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	T.ACQ_SOURCE_CD AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2,
	TRIM(T.MKT_AMT)  AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT,
	T.MKT_AMT AS AMOUNT_VALUE
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
			'PRODUCT FORECAST' AS FCST_TYPE,
			MADEON_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
			MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
			BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
			'CORE' AS ACQ_SOURCE_CD ,
			CAST((SUM(MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT )) AS  DECIMAL(26,7)) MKT_AMT,
			SUM(MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT ) AS MKT_AMT1
			
		FROM
		(
			SELECT	
				MADEON.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS MADEON_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
				MADEFOR.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
				MADEFOR.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
				MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS  MADEFOR_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
				NLOVC.LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT AS SOURCE_TYPE,
				NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME ,
				NSBE.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME ,
				SUM(RBPF.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY *  NPSBA.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS MARKETING_FCST_UNIT_QTY ,
				SUM(RBPF.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * NPSBA.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT
			FROM	
				$$SLSORDVWDB.R_BOOKINGS_PF_STL3_FMTH RBPF
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFSVDB.SV_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN  RSH
					ON RBPF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MADEON 
					ON RBPF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MADEON.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MADEFOR 
					ON RBPF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_FAMILY_SBE_ALLOCATION NPSBA
					ON RBPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = NPSBA.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID 
					AND	MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT = NPSBA.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT 
					AND	MADEFOR.FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT = NPSBA.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUM_INT 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY NSBE  
					ON NSBE.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME = NPSBA.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME
				INNER JOIN
				(
					SELECT LOV_VALUE_CHAR,
						LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT
					FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_LIST_OF_VALUES_CHAR
					WHERE LOV_APPLICATION_NAME = 'ALL'
						AND LOV_NAME = 'BOOKINGS_TYPE' 
						AND LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT = 'Product' 
				) NLOVC 
				ON RBPF.SERVICE_FLG = NLOVC.LOV_VALUE_CHAR
			WHERE	1=1
				AND NPSBA.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND NSBE.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND RBPF.DV_BOOKINGS_TYPE = 'CORE'
				AND	RBPF.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG = 'Y' 
				AND	MADEFOR.FISCAL_QTR_AGE BETWEEN 0 AND 8
				AND	RBPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'WEBEX' 
				AND	NPSBA.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'WEBEX'  
				AND	RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE' 
/*AND	RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_NAME_CODE 
<> 'WW Distribution' */
				AND MADEFOR.FISCAL_MONTH_AGE >0
 /* CHECK THIS OUT  - Remove if Current Month's bookings amount has tobe included too*/
			GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7

			UNION

			SELECT
				MADEON.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS MADEON_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
				MADEFOR.DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS MADEFOR_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID,
				MADEFOR.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
				MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,
				NLOVC.LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT AS SOURCE_TYPE,
				BHPF.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME ,
				BHPF.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME ,
				SUM(MPF.MARKETING_FCST_UNIT_QTY * BHPF.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS MARKETING_FCST_UNIT_QTY ,
				SUM(MPF.MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT * BHPF.PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT) AS MARKETING_FCST_DOLLAR_AMT
			FROM
				$$INVFLMTVWDB.MT_PRODUCT_FCST MPF
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_BE_HIER_PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOC BHPF
					ON MPF.PRODUCT_KEY = BHPF.ITEM_KEY
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MADEON
					ON MADEON.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MPF.FCST_MADE_ON_YEAR_MONTH_INT
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR MADEFOR
					ON MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MPF.FCST_MADE_FOR_YEAR_MONTH_INT
					AND	MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT = BHPF.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
				INNER JOIN
				(
					SELECT LOV_VALUE_CHAR,
						LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT
					FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_LIST_OF_VALUES_CHAR
					WHERE LOV_APPLICATION_NAME = 'ALL'
						AND LOV_NAME = 'BOOKINGS_TYPE'  
						AND LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT = 'Product' 
				) NLOVC 
					ON NLOVC.LOV_VALUE_CHAR = 'N' 
			WHERE BHPF.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND	MADEFOR.FISCAL_QTR_AGE BETWEEN -8 AND 0
				AND MADEON.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y'  
				/*  AND MADEFOR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT >  MADEON.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT Include this , if current months forecast to be taken from bookings table*/
				AND	BHPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID <> 'WEBEX'
			GROUP	BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
		) X
		GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
	)T
)FNL_QRY

/* Interim  table to hold revenue, gross margin */

SELECT
BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME ,
	BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME ,
	FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
	ACQ_SOURCE_CD ,
	NET_REV_AMT ,
	NET_COST_AMT ,
	GROSS_MARGIN ,
	REVENUE_MARGIN
FROM
(
	SELECT 
		RFMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
		SUB.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
		SUB.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
		CASE     WHEN MGTSPQ.ACQUISITION_FLG='Y' THEN 'NONCORE' 
                ELSE      'CORE'  END         AS ACQ_SOURCE_CD,   			
		SUM(MGTSPQ.NET_REVENUE_USD_AMT) AS NET_REV_AMT,
		SUM(MGTSPQ.NET_COST_USD_AMT ) AS NET_COST_AMT,
		CAST(((NET_REV_AMT-NET_COST_AMT)/NULLIFZERO(NET_REV_AMT))*100  AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS GROSS_MARGIN,
		TRIM(CAST(NET_REV_AMT AS DECIMAL(26,7))) REVENUE_MARGIN

	FROM 
		$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCE_PUBLISHED_PL_METRICS MGTSPQ 
		INNER JOIN 	$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMY 
			ON RFMY.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = MGTSPQ.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
		INNER JOIN 	$$COMREFSVDB.SV_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH

				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY  SUB 
			ON MGTSPQ.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME =SUB.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME

		AND FISCAL_YEAR_AGE in (0,1,2) 
				AND SUB.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND MGTSPQ.SERVICE_FLG='N'
	GROUP BY 1,2,3,4

)A

/*TOTAL BOOKINGS ACTUAL SUB-BE CORENCORE*/
SELECT
	SCORECARD_ID ,
	METRIC_ID ,
	MEASURE_NAME_DIM1 ,
	HIERARCHY_TYPE ,
	AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC ,
	TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC ,
	FNL_QRY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME ,
	RFMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_ID ,
    ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3 ,
	HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
	NULL AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM5,
	AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT ,
	AMOUNT_VALUE,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
    USER EDW_CREATE_USER

FROM
(
	SELECT
		1 SCORECARD_ID,
		1001 METRIC_ID,
		'TOTAL BOOKINGS' AS MEASURE_NAME_DIM1,
		'SUB BE' AS HIERARCHY_TYPE,
		'ACTUAL' AS AMOUNT_TYPE_DESC,
		'QUARTERLY' TIME_GRANULARITY_DESC,
		T.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME AS FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
		T.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM3,
		T.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME AS HIERARCHY_VALUE_DIM4,
		T.ACQ_SOURCE_CD AS ACQUISITION_SOURCE_GRP_DIM2,
		T.BOOKINGS_AMOUNT AMOUNT_VALUE_FMT,
		T.BOOKINGS_AMOUNT AS AMOUNT_VALUE
	FROM
	(
		SELECT
			X.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
			DIM_2 AS ACQ_SOURCE_CD,
			X.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			X.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
			SUM(BOOKINGS_AMOUNT) AS BOOKINGS_AMOUNT1,
			TRIM(CAST(SUM(BOOKINGS_AMOUNT)  AS DECIMAL(26,7))) BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
		FROM
		(
			SELECT
				FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,
				LOV.LOV_DESCRIPTION_TXT as DIM_2,
				SUB.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
				SUB.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME,
				SUM(RBF.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * COALESCE(PRDT_FAMILY_ALLOCATION_PCT,1)) BOOKINGS_AMOUNT
			FROM
				$$SLSORDVWDB.R_BOOKINGS_PF_STL3_FMTH   RBF
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFSVDB.SV_SALES_HIERARCHY_FIN RSH
					ON	RBF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR RFMT
					ON	RBF.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_FAMILY_SBE_ALLOCATION  ALLOC
					ON ALLOC.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID=RBF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID
					AND ALLOC.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT=RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
					AND ALLOC.BK_FISCAL_QUARTER_NUM_INT=RFMT.FISCAL_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY  SUB
					ON ALLOC.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME =SUB.BK_SUB_BUSINESS_ENTITY_NAME
			INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_LIST_OF_VALUES_CHAR LOV
ON LOV.LOV_VALUE_CHAR=RBF.ACQUISITION_SOURCE_CD
AND LOV.LOV_NAME='Acquisition_Source_Code' 
				/*AND	RSH.L1_SALES_TERRITORY_DESCR NOT IN ('WW DISTRIBUTION') */
				AND RSH.SALES_TERRITORY_TYPE_CODE = 'CORP. REVENUE'  /* This was not there earlier added to match BO*/
				AND	RBF.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG = 'Y' 
				/*AND	RBF.SERVICE_FLG='N'*/
				AND ALLOC.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND SUB.BK_BUSINESS_ENTITY_TYPE_CD='I'
				AND	RFMT.FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (0,	1,2)
				AND	RFMT.FISCAL_QTR_AGE >= 0
			GROUP	BY 1,2,3,4
		)X
		GROUP BY 1,2,3,4
	)T
)FNL_QRY
INNER JOIN (SELECT FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME,DV_FISCAL_QUARTER_ID AS FISCAL_QUARTER_ID
	FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE IN (-2,-1,0,1,2)
GROUP BY 1,2)RFMY  ON
RFMY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME = FNL_QRY.FISCAL_QUARTER_NAME
